channel.title: Iot-Device on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Iot-Device on Arrans github.io

item.title: sharandac/My-TTGO-Watch
item.description: A GUI named hedge for smartwatch like devices based on ESP32. Currently support for T-Watch2020 (V1,V2,V3), T-Watch2021, M5Paper, M5Core2 and native Linux support for testing.

item.title: microsoft/EdgeML
item.description: This repository provides code for machine learning algorithms for edge devices developed at Microsoft Research India.
